sections.content: Measures actual billed sales against assigned targets.
sections.subtitle: #CAF vs Target (100%)

sections.content: Calculated based on the level of target achievement.
sections.subtitle: #Sales Score Calculation

sections.content: Measures how many visited outlets result in a bill.
sections.subtitle: #Visit Strike Rate (30%)

sections.content: Measures average sales value per bill.
sections.subtitle: #Drop Size (20%)

sections.content: Measures the number of different products sold per bill.
sections.subtitle: #SKUs per Call (15%)

sections.content: Measures distribution of new or innovation products.
sections.subtitle: #Innovation SKUs (15%)

sections.content: Calculated by combining all the above KPIs based on their weightage.
sections.subtitle: #Skill Score Calculation

sections.content: Measures the quality and effectiveness of selling execution in the market.
sections.subtitle: Skill Score

sections.content: Measures effort, discipline, and consistency in market coverage and daily execution.
sections.subtitle: Will Score

sections.content: Measures sales achievement against assigned business targets.
sections.subtitle: Sales Score

sections.content: Derived from the combined Skill, Will, and Sales performance of the full sales representative team.
sections.subtitle: Overall Score

clientconfig::se_day_summary_configurati.description: End time when day summary is available in local time

clientconfig::se_specific_configuration.description: Determines whether to show pjp toggle and what should be the value to display on toggle

clientconfig::se_specific_configuration.description: Determines whether to display outlet visit timer or not

clientconfig::se_specific_configuration.description: check whether these fields are not empty before sending otp

clientconfig::se_work_with_configuration.description: submit form only once on a day

clientconfig::store_inventory_configurat.name: inventoryTransactionVisibility
clientconfig::store_inventory_configurat.description: Whether to show previous inventory qty and last inventory date in store inventory card

clientconfig::target_configuration.description: Calculation of tgt/ach on monthly/period basis

orderget::v3.orderQuery: select ord.*,cu.name,cu.mobile,cod.outlet_name,cod.contactno from ck_orders ord join (select loginid,name,mobile from ck_user) cu ON ord.supplierid=cu.loginid join (select outletcode,outlet_name,contactno from ck_outlet_details) cod ON ord.outletcode= cod.outletcode where  ord.order_number in (select id from orderx_numbers) order by {DYNAMIC_SORT}
orderget::v3.minimalOrderQuery: select ord.id, ord.beat, ord.beat_name, ord.normalized_quantity, ord.extended_attributes, ord.outletcode, ord.loginid, ord.source, ord.net_amount, ord.creation_time, ord.order_number, ord.outletcode, ord.supplierid, ord.status, ord.type, cu.name, cu.mobile, cod.outlet_name, cod.contactno from ck_orders ord join (select loginid, name, mobile from ck_user) cu on ord.supplierid = cu.loginid join (select outletcode, outlet_name, contactno from ck_outlet_details) cod on ord.outletcode = cod.outletcode where ord.order_number in (select id from orderx_numbers) order by {DYNAMIC_SORT}
orderget::v3.orderDetailsQuery: select ods.* from ck_order_details ods where ods.order_id in ({order_ids})
orderget::v3.orderHistoryQuery: select coh.* from ck_order_history coh where coh.order_id in ({order_ids})
orderget::v3.minimalOrderIdQuery: insert into orderx_numbers select order_number, status from ck_orders ord {where_block}  {DYNAMIC_FILTER} {hierarchy_condition} order by {DYNAMIC_SORT}  limit {DYNAMIC_LIMIT}
orderget::v3.minimalOrderDetailsQuery: select ods.order_id, ods.type, ods.batch_code, ods.case_quantity, ods.piece_quantity, ods.other_unit_quantity from ck_order_details ods where ods.order_id in ({order_ids})
orderget::v3.minimalOrderHistoryQuery: select coh.creation_time, coh.status, coh.order_id from ck_order_history coh where coh.order_id in ({order_ids})

outletproductinfo::userDynamicQuery.query: SELECT opi.outlet_code, opi.product_info FROM ck_outlet_product_info opi JOIN ck_userdesignation ud ON ud.login_id='{{loginId}}' LEFT JOIN ck_route_info ri ON ud.designation='salesrep' AND ri.salesman_code='{{loginId}}' AND ri.active_status='active' WHERE ((ud.designation IN ('se','salesexecutive') AND opi.loginid='{{supplier}}' AND opi.supplier='{{supplier}}') OR (ud.designation='distributor' AND opi.loginid='{{loginId}}' AND opi.supplier=IF('{{supplier}}'='', 'heritage', '{{supplier}}')) OR (ud.designation='salesrep' AND opi.loginid=ri.supplier AND opi.supplier=ri.supplier) OR (ud.designation='reportadmin' AND opi.loginid='{{supplier}}' AND opi.supplier='{{supplier}}')) LIMIT 1;

password::passwordComplexity.message: Password must contain a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a digit, and a special character.

password::permission.defaultPasswordErrorMessage: Your password is default.Please change it!

productdetails::apiquery.query: select sku_piece_weight,file_name, sku_name ,sku_code, batch_code, market_sku_code,m_code, sku_description, category, category_code, sub_category, sub_category_code,product_code, sub_brand, brand, brand_code, piece_size, piece_size_desc, case_to_piece_quantity, case_to_other_unit_quantity, other_unit_to_piece_quantity, piece_to_other_unit_quantity, priority, blob_key,blob_key_a,blob_key_b,blob_key_c, blob_key_f, blob_key_l, other_unit_name, smart_buy , display , flavour, item_type, item_desc, group_id,item_class, uom,translation,product_description from ck_productdetails {where_block} {DYNAMIC_FILTER} limit {DYNAMIC_LIMIT}

ProductMetaData::CatalogueQuery.query: select pd.sku_piece_weight,pd.active_status,pd.blob_key,pd.brand,pd.case_to_piece_quantity,pd.category,pd.file_name,pd.piece_size,pd.piece_size_desc,pd.priority,pd.sku_code,pd.sku_description,pd.sub_category,pd.suggestion_text,pd.batch_code,pd.case_to_other_unit_quantity,pd.item_class,pd.item_id,pd.item_name,pd.uom,pd.sku_name,pd.active_status from ck_productdetails pd where pd.active_status='active'

SFAProductDetails::CatalogueQuery.query: SELECT pd.other_unit_to_piece_quantity,pd.other_unit_mrp, pd.active_status, pd.blob_key, pd.brand, pd.case_to_piece_quantity, pd.category, pd.file_name, pd.piece_size, pd.piece_size_desc, pd.priority, pd.sku_code, pd.sku_description, pd.sub_category, pd.suggestion_text, pd.batch_code, pd.case_to_other_unit_quantity, pd.item_class, pd.item_id, pd.item_name, pd.uom, pd.sku_name, pd.display FROM ck_productdetails pd where pd.active_status = 'active'

SFAProductMetaData::CatalogueQuery.query: SELECT pd.other_unit_to_piece_quantity,pd.other_unit_mrp, pm.extended_attributes, pm.batch_id, pm.other_unit_ptr, pd.active_status, pd.blob_key, pd.brand, pd.case_to_piece_quantity, pd.category, pd.file_name, pd.piece_size, pd.piece_size_desc, pd.priority, pd.sku_code, pd.sku_description, pd.sub_category, pd.suggestion_text, pd.batch_code, pd.case_to_other_unit_quantity, pd.item_class, pd.item_id, pd.item_name, pd.uom, pd.sku_name, pd.display, pm.case_mrp, pm.case_ptr, pm.max_qty, pm.min_qty, pm.pack_ptr, pm.price_list, pm.sku_code, pm.loginid, pm.batch_code, pm.mrp FROM ck_productdetails pd INNER JOIN ck_productmetadata pm ON pm.batch_code = pd.batch_code and pm.active_status = 'active' and pd.active_status = 'active' AND pm.batch_id IN ({{batchId}}) AND (pm.loginId IN ({{loginId}}) or pm.price_list in ({{priceList}})) where true

templates::lob-creation-automailer.data:
Your Project Creation is Complete!

Dear User,

Your project creation process is now successfully complete!

Project Details:

• Project Name: {{lob}}

Access Your Onboarding Page:

Get started by visiting your onboarding page:-
Click here to access

Use the following credentials to log in:

• Username: {{workEmail}}
• Password: {{defaultPassword}}

Explore Our Standard Application:

We invite you to explore our standard SFAI & eB2B Apps with dummy data:

Android version: Download for Android

iOS version: Download for iOS

Please find the QR codes below for easy access to our Android and iOS App links:

Use the following credentials to log into the app:

  • Login as a SalesRep (SFAI login):
    • Username: {{SFAIuser}}
    • Password: {{defaultPassword}}

  • Login as a Retailer (eB2B login):
    • Username: {{eB2BUsername}}
    • Password: {{defaultPassword}}

Best Regards,

Salescode.ai
